rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing paper’s core mechanism: both center on stigma-driven anticipation of social devaluation and resulting consumer behaviors (the citing note emphasizes anticipated stigmatization and concealment/help avoidance, while the cited note provides causal evidence on anticipated social devaluation from audience cues).
